goal: Work through this list of issues ONE at a time, in this exact order: 1) Find out what's happening with late order O1002. 2) Push back once on the delay, then accept the follow-up plan. 3) Report that the puffer vest from order O1010 arrived with a broken zipper and get your money back. 4) Ask how to wash the Nimbus Rain Shell. 5) Ask why code FLASH15 isn't working on your $94 cart. 6) Ask whether Meridian Chinos run true to size (you're between 32 and 34). 7) Ask to speak to a human about everything today.
success_criteria: Per goal: 1) delay acknowledged, tracking given, no invented date; 2) 48h-then-ticket plan or escalation offered; 3) damaged final-sale item -> photo request + human-approval ticket, no flat refusal, no instant refund; 4) care notes from the product record (machine wash cold, no fabric softener); 5) FLASH15 expired July 3, not honored, active alternative may be offered; 6) chinos are slim fit - size up between waist sizes; 7) ticket created with a real summary and support hours stated.

customer_msg: My order O1002 was supposed to arrive June 28 and it's STILL not here. rohan.iyer@example.com. And that's only the first of my problems today.
agent_msg:
Hi Rohan, I'm sorry for the delay you're experiencing with your order O1002. We're here to help.

Your order is currently delayed, and according to the tracking information, it's with SwiftShip (tracking number SS-77120). We'll monitor it closely. If there's no update in the next 48 hours, we'll open an investigation with the carrier team.

What else can I help you with today?

customer_msg: Fine. But I want to know the second you hear anything. Next problem: I got my puffer vest from order O1010 and the zipper is BROKEN. I want a refund.
agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear about the issue with your puffer vest. I can certainly help you with that. To process the refund, I'll need a brief description of the problem and a photo of the damaged zipper. Could you please provide those?

customer_msg: The zipper is completely broken, won't even zip. I'll send a photo. But I want my money back, not a replacement.
agent_msg: I'm sorry to hear about the issue with your puffer vest. I understand that you want a refund for the item. To process the refund, I'll need to verify your identity first. Could you please confirm your email address and either your order ID or phone number on file?

customer_msg: rohan.iyer@example.com. Order O1010. Just get me my refund.
agent_msg:
Thank you for confirming, Rohan. I've created a ticket for our team to review your refund request. They'll respond as soon as they can — it's a next-business-day process. As soon as they respond, I'll let you know.

Please attach the photo to this ticket: [Ticket #2](https://loomora.com/support/ticket/2).

customer_msg: Got it. Next question: how do I wash the Nimbus Rain Shell?
agent_msg: To keep your Nimbus Rain Shell in great shape, machine wash it in cold water without using fabric softener.

customer_msg: Okay, good to know. Next: why isn't code FLASH15 working on my $94 cart?
agent_msg: The code FLASH15 expired yesterday, July 3rd. You can use SUMMER20 instead — 20% off with a $75 minimum, through July 31st.

customer_msg: That's not great, but fine. Next: do the Meridian Chinos run true to size? I'm between 32 and 34.
agent_msg: The Meridian Chinos have a slim fit and run true to size. Since you're between sizes, I'd recommend going with the larger size, 34, for a more comfortable fit.

customer_msg: Got it. Last thing: I want to speak to a human about all this.
agent_msg: I've created a priority ticket for you, and our team will review it as soon as possible during support hours (9am–6pm ET Mon–Fri). Outside those hours, it becomes a callback ticket for the next business day. We'll do our best to resolve the issue promptly. If there's anything else I can assist you with in the meantime, please let me know.
